sentences.sentence: Stadiums are among the oldest forms of urban architecture: vast stadiums where the public could watch sporting events were at the centre of western city life as far back as the ancient Greek and Roman Empires, well before the construction of the great medieval cathedrals and the grand 19th- and 20th-century railway stations which dominated urban skylines in later eras.
sentences.translation: 体育场馆属于最古老的城市建筑形式之一：早在古希腊和罗马帝国时期，公众可以观看体育赛事的大型体育场就是西方城市生活的中心，远早于伟大的中世纪大教堂以及后来主导城市天际线的宏大19、20世纪火车站的建设。

structure.text: Stadiums
are among the oldest forms of urban architecture
vast stadiums where the public could watch sporting events were at the centre of western city life
where the public could watch sporting events
as far back as the ancient Greek and Roman Empires
which dominated urban skylines in later eras

difficult_points: 冒号后的 vast stadiums 对前面的 Stadiums 作具体展开，说明古代体育场的城市地位。
where 引导定语从句，修饰 vast stadiums。
as far back as 强调时间早至古希腊和罗马帝国。
which 引导定语从句，修饰 railway stations。

expressions.text: be among the oldest forms of
expressions.meaning_zh: 属于最古老的……形式之一

sentences.sentence: Today, however, stadiums are regarded with growing scepticism.
sentences.translation: 然而如今，人们对体育场馆越来越持怀疑态度。

structure.text: Today, however
stadiums
are regarded with growing scepticism

difficult_points: however 标记与前文古代体育场中心地位之间的转折。
are regarded 是被动语态，表达外界对体育场馆的看法。
growing scepticism 表示怀疑态度在增强。

sentences.sentence: Construction costs can soar above £1 billion, and stadiums finished for major events such as the Olympic Games or the FIFA World Cup have notably fallen into disuse and disrepair.
sentences.translation: 建设成本可能飙升到10亿英镑以上，而为奥运会或国际足联世界杯等重大赛事建成的体育场馆，已经明显陷入闲置和失修。

structure.text: Construction costs
can soar above £1 billion
and stadiums finished for major events such as the Olympic Games or the FIFA World Cup have notably fallen into disuse and disrepair
finished for major events such as the Olympic Games or the FIFA World Cup

difficult_points: can soar above 表示成本可能急剧升至某一水平以上。
finished for major events 是过去分词短语，修饰 stadiums。
fallen into disuse and disrepair 是现在完成时，强调这些场馆已进入闲置和失修状态。

sentences.sentence: But this need not be the case.
sentences.translation: 但情况并非一定如此。

structure.text: But
this
need not be the case

difficult_points: this 回指前文体育场昂贵、闲置和失修的负面情况。
need not 表示“并非必须”，强调这种结果可以避免。

sentences.sentence: History shows that stadiums can drive urban development and adapt to the culture of every age.
sentences.translation: 历史表明，体育场馆能够推动城市发展，并适应每个时代的文化。

structure.text: History
shows
that stadiums can drive urban development and adapt to the culture of every age
drive urban development and adapt to the culture of every age

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明历史展示出的结论。
drive 和 adapt 是并列动词，共同说明 stadiums 的能力。
the culture of every age 指不同历史时期的文化，而不是人的年龄。

sentences.sentence: Even today, architects and planners are finding new ways to adapt the mono-functional sports arenas which became emblematic of modernisation during the 20th century.
sentences.translation: 即使在今天，建筑师和规划者也在寻找新的方法，来改造那些在20世纪成为现代化象征的单一功能体育竞技场。

structure.text: Even today
architects and planners
are finding new ways
to adapt the mono-functional sports arenas
which became emblematic of modernisation during the 20th century

difficult_points: are finding 使用现在进行时，强调当下仍在探索新方法。
to adapt 是不定式短语，说明 new ways 的用途。
which 引导定语从句，修饰 mono-functional sports arenas。
became emblematic of 表示“成为……的象征”。

sentences.sentence: The amphitheatre* of Arles in southwest France, with a capacity of 25,000 spectators, is perhaps the best example of just how versatile stadiums can be.
sentences.translation: 法国西南部阿尔勒的圆形剧场可容纳25000名观众，也许是最能说明体育场馆可以多么多用途的例子。

structure.text: The amphitheatre* of Arles in southwest France
with a capacity of 25,000 spectators
is perhaps the best example
of just how versatile stadiums can be
how versatile stadiums can be

difficult_points: with a capacity of 是插入性介词短语，补充说明可容纳人数。
just how versatile stadiums can be 是 how 引导的名词性从句，作 of 的宾语。
versatile 指用途多样，而不只是“有才华”。

sentences.sentence: Built by the Romans in 90 AD, it became a fortress with four towers after the fifth century, and was then transformed into a village containing more than 200 houses.
sentences.translation: 它由罗马人于公元90年建成，5世纪以后变成了一座带有四座塔楼的堡垒，后来又被改造成一个拥有200多座房屋的村庄。

structure.text: Built by the Romans in 90 AD
it
became a fortress with four towers after the fifth century
and was then transformed into a village containing more than 200 houses
containing more than 200 houses

difficult_points: Built by the Romans 是过去分词短语，说明 it 的建造背景。
became 和 was transformed 是按时间推进的并列谓语。
containing more than 200 houses 修饰 village，说明村庄规模。

sentences.sentence: With the growing interest in conservation during the 19th century, it was converted back into an arena for the staging of bullfights, thereby returning the structure to its original use as a venue for public spectacles.
sentences.translation: 随着19世纪人们对保护工作的兴趣日益增长，它被重新改回竞技场，用于举办斗牛，从而使这座建筑回归了作为公共观赏活动场所的原始用途。

structure.text: With the growing interest in conservation during the 19th century
it
was converted back into an arena
for the staging of bullfights
thereby returning the structure to its original use as a venue for public spectacles

difficult_points: With 短语交代历史背景，即保护意识增强。
was converted back into 强调被改回原先的竞技场形态。
thereby 引出结果，说明改造使建筑回归原始用途。
as a venue for public spectacles 修饰 original use。

sentences.sentence: Another example is the imposing arena of Verona in northern Italy, with space for 30,000 spectators, which was built 60 years before the Arles amphitheatre and 40 years before Rome's famous Colosseum.
sentences.translation: 另一个例子是意大利北部维罗纳宏伟的竞技场，可容纳30000名观众；它比阿尔勒圆形剧场早60年建成，比罗马著名的斗兽场早40年建成。

structure.text: Another example
is the imposing arena of Verona in northern Italy
with space for 30,000 spectators
which was built 60 years before the Arles amphitheatre and 40 years before Rome's famous Colosseum

difficult_points: with space for 30,000 spectators 是容量说明，插入在主句和定语从句之间。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 Verona arena 的建造时间。
before 在两个并列时间短语中重复省略，比较两个古代建筑。

sentences.sentence: It has endured the centuries and is currently considered one of the world's prime sites for opera, thanks to its outstanding acoustics.
sentences.translation: 它历经数个世纪保存至今，并且由于出色的音响效果，目前被认为是世界上最重要的歌剧场地之一。

structure.text: It
has endured the centuries
and is currently considered one of the world's prime sites for opera
thanks to its outstanding acoustics

difficult_points: has endured 使用现在完成时，强调从过去延续到现在。
is currently considered 是被动表达，说明如今的评价。
thanks to 引出原因，即其出色的声学效果。

sentences.sentence: The area in the centre of the Italian town of Lucca, known as the Piazza dell'Anfiteatro, is yet another impressive example of an amphitheatre becoming absorbed into the fabric of the city.
sentences.translation: 意大利卢卡镇中心被称为 Piazza dell'Anfiteatro 的区域，是圆形剧场融入城市肌理的又一个令人印象深刻的例子。

structure.text: The area in the centre of the Italian town of Lucca
known as the Piazza dell'Anfiteatro
is yet another impressive example
of an amphitheatre becoming absorbed into the fabric of the city

difficult_points: known as 是过去分词短语，补充说明该区域的名称。
becoming absorbed into 是动名词结构，作 of 的宾语。
the fabric of the city 是比喻表达，指城市结构和生活肌理。

sentences.sentence: The site evolved in a similar way to Arles and was progressively filled with buildings from the Middle Ages until the 19th century, variously used as houses, a salt depot and a prison.
sentences.translation: 该遗址以与阿尔勒类似的方式演变，并从中世纪到19世纪逐渐被建筑填满，这些建筑被不同地用作住宅、盐仓和监狱。

structure.text: The site
evolved in a similar way to Arles
and was progressively filled with buildings from the Middle Ages until the 19th century
variously used as houses, a salt depot and a prison

difficult_points: evolved 和 was filled 是并列谓语，描述遗址的历史变化。
from the Middle Ages until the 19th century 表示持续的时间跨度。
variously used 是过去分词短语，说明 buildings 的不同用途。

sentences.sentence: But rather than reverting to an arena, it became a market square, designed by Romanticist architect Lorenzo Nottolini.
sentences.translation: 但它并没有恢复为竞技场，而是变成了一个由浪漫主义建筑师 Lorenzo Nottolini 设计的市场广场。

structure.text: But rather than reverting to an arena
it
became a market square
designed by Romanticist architect Lorenzo Nottolini

difficult_points: rather than reverting to an arena 表示没有回到竞技场用途，而是选择另一种功能。
designed by 是过去分词短语，修饰 market square。
But 标记该遗址与阿尔勒不同的发展路径。

sentences.sentence: Today, the ruins of the amphitheatre remain embedded in the various shops and residences surrounding the public square.
sentences.translation: 如今，圆形剧场的遗迹仍嵌在环绕公共广场的各种商店和住宅之中。

structure.text: Today
the ruins of the amphitheatre
remain embedded in the various shops and residences
surrounding the public square

difficult_points: remain embedded 强调遗迹至今仍嵌入现代城市建筑中。
surrounding the public square 是现在分词短语，修饰 shops and residences。
various shops and residences 表明该遗址已融入日常商业和居住空间。

sentences.sentence: There are many similarities between modern stadiums and the ancient amphitheatres intended for games.
sentences.translation: 现代体育场与用于比赛的古代圆形剧场之间有许多相似之处。

structure.text: There are
many similarities between modern stadiums and the ancient amphitheatres
intended for games

difficult_points: There are 是存在句，信息重点是 many similarities。
between ... and ... 标出比较的两类建筑。
intended for games 是过去分词短语，修饰 ancient amphitheatres。

sentences.sentence: But some of the flexibility was lost at the beginning of the 20th century, as stadiums were developed using new products such as steel and reinforced concrete, and made use of bright lights for night-time matches.
sentences.translation: 但在20世纪初，随着体育场馆使用钢材和钢筋混凝土等新产品建造，并利用明亮灯光进行夜间比赛，其中一些灵活性丧失了。

structure.text: But some of the flexibility
was lost at the beginning of the 20th century
as stadiums were developed using new products such as steel and reinforced concrete
and made use of bright lights for night-time matches

difficult_points: But 标记现代体育场与古代圆形剧场的差异开始出现。
was lost 是被动语态，说明 flexibility 的减少。
as 引导原因/背景状语从句，解释灵活性丧失的技术背景。
made use of 与 were developed 并列，主语同为 stadiums。

sentences.sentence: Many such stadiums are situated in suburban areas, designed for sporting use only and surrounded by parking lots.
sentences.translation: 许多这样的体育场位于郊区，只为体育用途而设计，并被停车场包围。

structure.text: Many such stadiums
are situated in suburban areas
designed for sporting use only
and surrounded by parking lots

difficult_points: such stadiums 回指前文20世纪发展出的现代体育场。
designed 和 surrounded 是并列过去分词短语，补充说明这些体育场的特点。
sporting use only 强调功能单一。

sentences.sentence: These factors mean that they may not be as accessible to the general public, require more energy to run and contribute to urban heat.
sentences.translation: 这些因素意味着，它们对普通公众来说可能不那么容易到达，需要更多能源来运行，并会加剧城市热效应。

structure.text: These factors
mean
that they may not be as accessible to the general public, require more energy to run and contribute to urban heat
may not be as accessible to the general public, require more energy to run and contribute to urban heat

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明这些因素造成的后果。
they 指代前一句的 stadiums。
be as accessible、require、contribute 三个谓语并列，列举多个负面影响。
to run 是不定式，说明 more energy 的用途。

sentences.sentence: But many of today's most innovative architects see scope for the stadium to help improve the city.
sentences.translation: 但如今许多最具创新精神的建筑师看到了体育场馆帮助改善城市的空间。

structure.text: But
many of today's most innovative architects
see scope for the stadium
to help improve the city

difficult_points: But 与上一段现代体育场的缺点形成转折。
see scope for 表示“看到……的可能性/空间”。
to help improve the city 修饰 scope，说明这种可能性的方向。

sentences.sentence: Among the current strategies, two seem to be having particular success: the stadium as an urban hub, and as a power plant.
sentences.translation: 在当前策略中，有两种似乎特别成功：把体育场作为城市枢纽，以及作为发电站。

structure.text: Among the current strategies
two
seem to be having particular success
the stadium as an urban hub, and as a power plant

difficult_points: Among 短语把范围限定为当前策略。
two 指代两种策略，冒号后给出具体内容。
as an urban hub 和 as a power plant 并列，说明体育场的两个新角色。

sentences.sentence: There's a growing trend for stadiums to be equipped with public spaces and services that serve a function beyond sport, such as hotels, retail outlets, conference centres, restaurants and bars, children's playgrounds and green space.
sentences.translation: 一种日益明显的趋势是，体育场馆配备公共空间和服务，这些空间和服务承担超越体育的功能，例如酒店、零售店、会议中心、餐厅和酒吧、儿童游乐场以及绿地。

structure.text: There's a growing trend
for stadiums to be equipped with public spaces and services
that serve a function beyond sport
such as hotels, retail outlets, conference centres, restaurants and bars, children's playgrounds and green space

difficult_points: There is 结构引出“趋势”这一新信息。
for stadiums to be equipped with 是 for + 宾语 + 不定式结构，说明 trend 的内容。
that serve a function beyond sport 修饰 public spaces and services。
such as 后列出的是超越体育功能的具体设施。

sentences.sentence: Creating mixed-use developments such as this reinforces compactness and multi-functionality, making more efficient use of land and helping to regenerate urban spaces.
sentences.translation: 打造这样的混合用途开发项目会加强紧凑性和多功能性，更高效地利用土地，并帮助城市空间再生。

structure.text: Creating mixed-use developments such as this
reinforces compactness and multi-functionality
making more efficient use of land
and helping to regenerate urban spaces

difficult_points: Creating mixed-use developments 是动名词短语，整体作主语。
such as this 指代上一句列举的体育场多功能配套。
making 和 helping 是结果性分词短语，说明这种开发带来的效果。

sentences.sentence: This opens the space up to families and a wider cross-section of society, instead of catering only to sportspeople and supporters.
sentences.translation: 这使空间向家庭和更广泛的社会群体开放，而不是只服务于运动员和支持者。

structure.text: This
opens the space up to families and a wider cross-section of society
instead of catering only to sportspeople and supporters

difficult_points: This 回指前文混合用途开发。
opens the space up to 表示让空间面向更广人群开放。
instead of 后接动名词 catering，说明被替代的单一服务对象。

sentences.sentence: There have been many examples of this in the UK: the mixed-use facilities at Wembley and Old Trafford have become a blueprint for many other stadiums in the world.
sentences.translation: 英国已有许多这样的例子：温布利和老特拉福德的混合用途设施已经成为世界上许多其他体育场馆的蓝本。

structure.text: There have been many examples of this in the UK
the mixed-use facilities at Wembley and Old Trafford
have become a blueprint
for many other stadiums in the world

difficult_points: 冒号后给出英国 examples 的具体说明。
have become 使用现在完成时，强调这些设施已形成可借鉴的模式。
blueprint 在这里比喻“蓝本、范例”，不是实际图纸。

sentences.sentence: The phenomenon of stadiums as power stations has arisen from the idea that energy problems can be overcome by integrating interconnected buildings by means of a smart grid, which is an electricity supply network that uses digital communications technology to detect and react to local changes in usage, without significant energy losses.
sentences.translation: 体育场作为发电站的现象源于这样一种想法：通过智能电网整合相互连接的建筑，可以克服能源问题；智能电网是一种利用数字通信技术来检测并响应当地用电变化、且不会造成显著能量损失的供电网络。

structure.text: The phenomenon of stadiums as power stations
has arisen from the idea
that energy problems can be overcome by integrating interconnected buildings by means of a smart grid
which is an electricity supply network
that uses digital communications technology to detect and react to local changes in usage
without significant energy losses

difficult_points: has arisen from 表示该现象的来源。
that energy problems can be overcome 是同位语从句，解释 the idea 的内容。
by integrating 和 by means of 分别说明克服能源问题的方式和工具。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，解释 smart grid 的含义。

sentences.sentence: Stadiums are ideal for these purposes, because their canopies have a large surface area for fitting photovoltaic panels and rise high enough (more than 40 metres) to make use of micro wind turbines.
sentences.translation: 体育场馆非常适合这些用途，因为它们的顶棚拥有很大的表面积可安装光伏板，而且高度足够高（超过40米），可以利用微型风力涡轮机。

structure.text: Stadiums
are ideal for these purposes
because their canopies have a large surface area for fitting photovoltaic panels and rise high enough (more than 40 metres) to make use of micro wind turbines
have a large surface area for fitting photovoltaic panels and rise high enough
to make use of micro wind turbines

difficult_points: because 引导原因状语从句，解释体育场适合发电用途的物理条件。
have 和 rise 是并列谓语，主语都是 their canopies。
for fitting photovoltaic panels 表示大表面积的用途。
to make use of micro wind turbines 表示足够高度带来的用途。

sentences.sentence: Freiburg Mage Solar Stadium in Germany is the first of a new wave of stadiums as power plants, which also includes the Amsterdam Arena and the Kaohsiung Stadium.
sentences.translation: 德国弗赖堡 Mage 太阳能体育场是新一波作为发电站的体育场馆中的第一个，这一类别还包括阿姆斯特丹竞技场和高雄体育场。

structure.text: Freiburg Mage Solar Stadium in Germany
is the first of a new wave of stadiums as power plants
which also includes the Amsterdam Arena and the Kaohsiung Stadium

difficult_points: the first of a new wave 表示它是新趋势中的首个代表。
as power plants 修饰 stadiums，说明体育场的新用途。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充列举同一浪潮中的其他体育场。

sentences.sentence: The latter, inaugurated in 2009, has 8,844 photovoltaic panels producing up to 1.14 GWh of electricity annually.
sentences.translation: 后者于2009年启用，拥有8844块光伏板，每年最多可产生1.14吉瓦时的电力。

structure.text: The latter
inaugurated in 2009
has 8,844 photovoltaic panels
producing up to 1.14 GWh of electricity annually

difficult_points: The latter 指前一句最后提到的 Kaohsiung Stadium。
inaugurated in 2009 是过去分词短语，补充说明启用时间。
producing up to ... 是现在分词短语，说明光伏板的发电能力。

sentences.sentence: This reduces the annual output of carbon dioxide by 660 tons and supplies up to 80 percent of the surrounding area when the stadium is not in use.
sentences.translation: 这使二氧化碳年排放量减少660吨，并在体育场不使用时为周边地区最多80%的区域供电。

structure.text: This
reduces the annual output of carbon dioxide by 660 tons
and supplies up to 80 percent of the surrounding area
when the stadium is not in use

difficult_points: This 指代前一句高雄体育场光伏板发电这一事实。
reduces ... by 660 tons 中 by 表示减少的幅度。
when 引导时间状语从句，限定 supplies 的发生条件。

sentences.sentence: This is proof that a stadium can serve its city, and have a decidedly positive impact in terms of reduction of CO2 emissions.
sentences.translation: 这证明，体育场馆可以服务其所在城市，并且在减少二氧化碳排放方面产生明确的积极影响。

structure.text: This
is proof
that a stadium can serve its city, and have a decidedly positive impact in terms of reduction of CO2 emissions
can serve its city, and have a decidedly positive impact
in terms of reduction of CO2 emissions

difficult_points: that 引导同位语从句，解释 proof 的具体内容。
serve 和 have 是并列动词，共同说明体育场对城市的作用。
in terms of 表示评价维度，即从减少二氧化碳排放角度看。

sentences.sentence: Sporting arenas have always been central to the life and culture of cities.
sentences.translation: 体育竞技场一直是城市生活和文化的核心。

structure.text: Sporting arenas
have always been central to the life and culture of cities

difficult_points: have always been 使用现在完成时，强调从过去到现在的持续状态。
central to 表示“对……至关重要/处于核心位置”。

expressions.text: the life and culture of cities

sentences.sentence: In every era, the stadium has acquired new value and uses: from military fortress to residential village, public space to theatre and most recently a field for experimentation in advanced engineering.
sentences.translation: 在每个时代，体育场都获得了新的价值和用途：从军事堡垒到居住村落，从公共空间到剧院，最近又成为先进工程实验的场地。

structure.text: In every era
the stadium
has acquired new value and uses
from military fortress to residential village, public space to theatre and most recently a field for experimentation in advanced engineering

difficult_points: has acquired 使用现在完成时，总结体育场在不同时代不断获得新用途。
冒号后用 from ... to ... 的并列结构列举用途变化。
most recently 表明 advanced engineering 是最新阶段的用途。

sentences.sentence: The stadium of today now brings together multiple functions, thus helping cities to create a sustainable future.
sentences.translation: 如今的体育场将多种功能汇集在一起，从而帮助城市创造可持续的未来。

structure.text: The stadium of today
now brings together multiple functions
thus helping cities to create a sustainable future

difficult_points: brings together 表示把多种功能整合在同一场馆中。
thus helping 是结果性分词短语，说明多功能整合带来的城市价值。
sustainable future 是全文结论中的关键词，呼应前文环保和城市再生策略。
